text.title: finetuning Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for finetuning as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Generating synthetic training data entirely from the same model you are fine-tuning.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This creates a circular training loop: the model learns to imitate itself, amplifying existing patterns and errors rather than correcting them. Use a stronger or different model to generate synthetic data, then validate the outputs before including them in the training set.
